zh.lifeSummary: Ellen Butler於1230年出生在英國斯塔福爾阿頓。她於1256年與Jacobus de Banastre在英國藍卡爾沃爾頓 奧 馮 希爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1283年11月27日在英國素可享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾洛可拉福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ellen Butler于1230年出生在英国斯塔福爾阿頓。她于1256年与Jacobus de Banastre在英国藍卡爾沃爾頓 奧 馮 希爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1283年11月27日在英国素可享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾洛可拉福。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Ellen Butler was born in 1230, in Alton, Staffordshire, England. She married Jacobus de Banastre in 1256, in Walton on the Hill, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 27 November 1283, in Sussex, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Rawcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 novembre 1283, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Rawcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Butlerは1230年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンで生まれた。1256年にイギリスランカシュアイアワルトン オン ス ヒルでJacobus de Banastreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1283年11月27日にイギリススセックスで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラウクリフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Butler(은)는 1230년 영국 스태퍼드실르 알턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1256년 영국 랭카실르 월턴  테 힐에서 Jacobus de Banastre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 11월 27일 영국 수세스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 롤c리프에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Ellen Butler родилась в 1230 г. в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jacobus de Banastre в 1256 г. в местности валтон он т хилл, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 27 ноября 1283 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности равклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
